title: Counterexample Scarcity Screen
readmeBody: Forty counterexample checks left four candidates eligible for freeze.
scientificQuestion: Can Sovryn generate a nontrivial high-impact discovery candidate that reaches external-review readiness under safe bounded evidence gates?
limitations: No candidate reached externally_review_ready_candidate in this run.
Fresh external checks are bounded public metadata, route, repo, formal, and reproducibility probes, not exhaustive domain studies.
The strongest candidate remains promising_but_unvalidated because holdout, replay, and mechanism pressure left unresolved caveats.
Materials, astrophysics, climate, and protein/structure metadata checks were limited to safe public computational artifacts and did not include laboratory-domain or high-risk execution.
Formal checks produced refutation and bounded-test evidence, not a checked positive proof.
Repo and benchmark claims remain environment- and protocol-sensitive.
No external expert reviewed the package during this run.
Scores are internal readiness scores, not prize-significance or external acceptance claims.
disclaimer: Bounded candidate-factory evidence only. This package does not claim a prize-grade result, outside validation, outside adoption, broad autonomous intelligence, broad acceleration, high-risk capability, or universal truth.
